title: carex cockayneana
intro: Carex cockayneana, also known as the Mountain Kaka-toki or the New Zealand Sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae, native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in New Zealand for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Carex cockayneana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and even act as an antiviral agent to combat certain infections. Carex cockayneana is typically prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
